TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ben Affleck == kawas tay 1972, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Ben Affleck, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Ben Affleck maki tay kawas 1980 msqun ki Jennifer Anne Garner, maki tay kawas 2018 t'alax. kawas tay 1927,ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Ben Affleck htagan beh sa Berkeley California. cyugal kawas nya,qutux ngasal nha musa maki beh Massachusetts. hiya yaya nya ga sinsiy pcbaq biru, mtzyaw beh Harvard-educated pqwasan laqi cikuy pcbaq laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == βen a**leʦ~ʨk == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βen a**leʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βen a**leʦ~ʨk maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *enni*er anne ɣarner, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βen a**leʦ~ʨk ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βerkelej ʦ~ʨali*ornia. ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ nja,qutux ŋas~ɕal nħa mus~ɕa maki βeħ mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ. ħija jaja nja ɣa s~ɕins~ɕij pʦ~ʨβaq βiru, mtzjaw βeħ ħar*ar*-e*uʦ~ʨate* pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj pʦ~ʨβaq laqi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: == Ben Affleck == kawas tay 1972, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Ben Affleck, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Ben Affleck maki tay kawas 1980 msqun ki Jennifer Anne Garner, maki tay kawas 2018 t'alax. kawas tay 1927,ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 8, Ben Affleck htagan beh sa Berkeley California. cyugal kawas nya,qutux ngasal nha musa maki beh Massachusetts. hiya yaya nya ga sinsiy pcbaq biru, mtzyaw beh Harvard-educated pqwasan laqi cikuy pcbaq laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == βen a**leʦ~ʨk == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βen a**leʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βen a**leʦ~ʨk maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *enni*er anne ɣarner, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. kawas~ɕ taj ****,rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βen a**leʦ~ʨk ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βerkelej ʦ~ʨali*ornia. ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ nja,qutux ŋas~ɕal nħa mus~ɕa maki βeħ mas~ɕs~ɕaʦ~ʨħus~ɕetts~ɕ. ħija jaja nja ɣa s~ɕins~ɕij pʦ~ʨβaq βiru, mtzjaw βeħ ħar*ar*-e*uʦ~ʨate* pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj pʦ~ʨβaq laqi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
